events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday, known for his iconic guitar riffs and astrophysics work.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! His guitar work with Queen is simply legendary. What's your favourite May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy, the moves, the voice – a true rock icon still going strong. Happy birthday, Sir Mick!

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with its first music video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles, forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with that iconic first video. The irony isn't lost on us, but it certainly changed music forever. What was your first favourite music video?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. Still sounds as fresh and vital as ever. What's your album opener: 'Rock 'n' Roll Star' or 'Supersonic'?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for Woodstock. Three days that made history. If you could have been there, who would you have seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, the world lost The King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Forever Jimi
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His influence on guitar music is simply immeasurable. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Abbey Road
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From 'Come Together' to 'Here Comes The Sun', it's a masterpiece. And that album cover? Instantly recognisable.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Enduring Voice
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock 'n' roll icon with a voice and attitude that's always commanded attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a rock 'n' roll legend, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only LG! Still rocking and still bringing that undeniable swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album and single 'Imagine' in 1971, which became a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon released 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today. A true classic.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped 25 years ago? 1,000 songs in your pocket! It completely changed the game for music lovers. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) to 007 and decades of iconic cinema and unforgettable theme tunes. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary co-founder of The Beatles and peace activist, John Lennon, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire millions worldwide.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy. What's your favourite Cleese moment?
